prompts.text: {vip}, last fling before the ring! Take 2 sips to start the night.
{vip}, give out 3 sips to whoever planned this party. They deserve it.
{vip}, take 3 sips -- tonight is ALL about you.
{vip}, give out 2 sips to whoever is most likely to get you in trouble tonight.
{player1}, raise your glass to the bride! Take 2 sips.
{player1}, give out 2 sips to whoever traveled the farthest to be here tonight.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s first kiss like? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s most embarrassing drunk story? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s biggest turn-off? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s worst haircut ever? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 3 sips.

{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s go-to drunk food? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s worst date ever? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s dream vacation destination? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s biggest pet peeve? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s hidden talent? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s go-to Starbucks or coffee order? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s most embarrassing outfit phase? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What song makes {vip} cry? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s worst habit? {vip} decides who nailed it. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s first concert? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s go-to drink order? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What would {vip} do with a million dollars? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... How many people has {vip} dated? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s most embarrassing moment in school? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What reality show would {vip} go on? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What app does {vip} have the most screen time on? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What does {vip} always have in their purse? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What scares {vip} most about married life? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's {vip}'s toxic trait? {vip} decides who nailed it. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s worst cooking disaster? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s comfort movie? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's the craziest thing {vip} has ever done? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What would {vip}'s last meal be? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... How old was {vip} during their first kiss? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's {vip}'s signature dance move? {vip} decides who described it best. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s zodiac sign? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What does {vip} look like first thing in the morning? {vip} decides who's most accurate. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's {vip}'s morning routine order? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What would {vip}'s stripper name be (first pet + street you grew up on)? {vip} reveals. Funniest guess gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's {vip}'s most played song on Spotify? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's the longest {vip} has gone without texting back? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s least favorite chore? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s first car? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's {vip}'s biggest shopping weakness? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s most irrational fear? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... Where was {vip}'s first date with their partner? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... How did {vip}'s partner propose? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s partner's most annoying habit? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What do {vip} and their partner argue about the most? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's {vip}'s partner's pet name for {vip}? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips. Embarrassing answers welcome.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s first impression of their partner? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... Where did {vip} and their partner meet? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's the most romantic thing {vip}'s partner has ever done? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What Netflix show have {vip} and their partner binged the most? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... Who said 'I love you' first -- {vip} or their partner? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, truth time: What's the most embarrassing thing your partner has caught you doing? Take 2 sips after.
{vip}, rate your partner's cooking on a scale of 1-10. Take that many sips divided by 2.
{vip}, what's one thing about single life you'll lowkey miss? Take 2 sips and be honest.
{vip}, what was your honest first thought when they proposed? Take 3 sips.
{vip}, describe your partner in 3 words. Take 1 sip per word.
{vip}, what is your partner's most annoying habit? Take 2 sips and spill.
{vip}, what's the biggest lie you've told your partner? Take 3 sips. We won't tell.
{vip}, who in this room has seen you at your absolute worst? Point to them. Both drink 2.
{vip}, what's the one thing you'd change about your partner? Take 3 sips. Choose carefully.
{vip}, what was your worst bridezilla moment? Own it. Take 2 sips.
{vip}, what song will definitely make you cry at the wedding? Take 2 sips.
{vip}, cold feet moment: have you had one? Take 3 sips regardless.
{vip}, what's the most expensive wedding purchase your partner doesn't know about? Take 3 sips.
{vip}, what's your partner's guilty pleasure that only you know about? Take 3 sips.
{vip}, who almost didn't make the guest list? Don't name names... unless you want to. Take 2 sips.
{vip}, how many times did you change your mind on the wedding dress? Take 1 sip per change.
{vip}, what dating app were you on before meeting your partner? Take 2 sips. No judgment.
{vip}, what's the wildest thing you did on a girls' trip? Take 3 sips and tell us EVERYTHING.
{vip}, what's the one thing your partner does that makes you melt? Take 2 sips.
{vip}, have you ever stalked your partner's ex on social media? Take 3 sips. We all have.
{vip}, what's the biggest compromise you made for this wedding? Take 2 sips.
{vip}, who was the first person you told when you got engaged? If they're here, they give out 3 sips.
{vip}, what's the most embarrassing text you've sent your partner? Take 3 sips. Show us if you dare.
{vip}, truth: did you practice your 'surprised face' for the proposal? Take 2 sips.
{vip}, what's the worst outfit your partner has ever worn? Take 2 sips and describe it.
{player1}, text your most recent ex 'thinking of you' or take 5 sips. Group watches.
{player1}, do your best impression of {vip}'s partner. If {vip} doesn't laugh, take 3 sips.
{player1}, show the group your most embarrassing photo. Can't? Take 4 sips.
{player1}, read the last text you sent out loud. Embarrassing? Take 2 sips.
{player1}, call someone not at this party and sing 'Happy Birthday' to them. Hang up before explaining. Or take 4 sips.
{player1}, let the group send one text from your phone to anyone. Or take 5 sips.
{player1}, do your best catwalk across the room. Worst walk (group votes) takes 3 sips.
{player1}, speak in an accent for the next 2 rounds. Drop it? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, give {vip} a lap dance for 10 seconds or take 5 sips.
{player1}, show your most recent selfie. If the group rates it under 7/10, take 3 sips.
{vip}, dare time: Let someone in the group send one text from your phone. Or take 5 sips.
{player1}, read {vip}'s most recent DM out loud. If {vip} vetoes it, you take 4 sips.
{player1}, recreate {vip}'s engagement pose. Best recreation (group votes) gives out 3 sips.
{player1}, tell us your body count or take 5 sips. No judgment zone.
{player1}, show the group your screen time report. Over 5 hours? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, make up a wedding vow for {vip} on the spot. If {vip} cringes, take 3 sips.
{player1}, belly dance for 15 seconds. Weak effort? Take 4 sips.
{player1}, swap an item of clothing with {vip} for 3 rounds or take 4 sips.
{player1}, tell us your most embarrassing hookup story or take 5 sips.
{player1}, serenade {vip} with any love song. Off-key counts. Refuse = 4 sips.
{player1}, show the group your 'going out' face vs your 'waking up' face. Best performance gives out 3 sips.
{player1}, act out how {vip}'s partner proposed. If {vip} says it's wrong, take 3 sips.
{player1}, show your camera roll. Group picks the most sus photo. Take 3 sips.
{player1}, call your partner and say 'we need to talk' then hang up. Or take 5 sips.
{player1}, let {vip} draw something on you with a marker. Or take 4 sips.
{vip}, pick someone to do a TikTok dance. If they refuse, they take 4 sips.
{player1}, whisper something to {vip}. If she laughs, give out 3 sips. If not, take 3.
{player1}, twerk for 10 seconds or take 4 sips. No in-between.
{player1}, show the group your most-liked Instagram photo. Under 100 likes? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, tell us the worst pickup line you've ever received. Funniest story gives out 3 sips (group votes).
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. The bride says so.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've ever been a bridesmaid before.
{player1}, take 2 sips for every wedding you have this year.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. It's a bachelorette, not a book club.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you showed up late tonight.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you're wearing matching outfits with the group.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. The veil comes off when the drinks go up.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've already posted about tonight on social media.
{player1}, take 2 sips for every ex's name you can remember right now.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. Pacing yourself is for brunch, not bachelorettes.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've ever slid into someone's DMs.
{player1}, take 2 sips. The maid of honor demands it.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips if you've been in {vip}'s life for over 5 years.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've ever ugly cried about a breakup.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you know {vip}'s partner's middle name. Don't? Take 4.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. Hydration is important. This counts.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you already know what you're wearing to the wedding.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you're the designated photographer tonight.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. {vip} needs you to keep up.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you're wearing a ring on your left hand. Taken sip.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you've ever had a one-night stand. 4 sips if you haven't. Pick your truth.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips if you've ever been on a dating app at the same time as {vip}.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you brought a flask. 3 sips if you wish you had.
{player1}, take 3 sips if your ex is still in your phone contacts.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. The bridesmaids' fund paid for this drink.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you secretly practiced catching the bouquet.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've ever ghosted someone.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. You're at a bachelorette. Act like it.
{player1}, give out {sip_count} sips to whoever is most likely to drunk text their ex tonight.
{vip}, give out {sip_count} sips to whoever you think will embarrass you the most tonight.
{vip}, give out 3 sips to your ride or die. No explanation needed.
{vip}, give out 2 sips to whoever planned the best part of tonight.
{player1}, give out {sip_count} sips to whoever has the wildest dating history.
{vip}, give out 3 sips to whoever has seen you at your most embarrassing.
{vip}, give 3 sips to whoever you've known the longest.
{player1}, give {sip_count} sips to whoever is most likely to get a stranger's number tonight.
{vip}, give out 3 sips however you want. Bride's privilege.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever just took the worst photo of {vip}.
{player1}, give {sip_count} sips to whoever is next to get engaged (group prediction).
{vip}, give 3 sips to whoever gives you the most unsolicited wedding advice.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever brought the best bachelorette gift.
{vip}, give out {sip_count} sips to whoever you want on the dance floor with you right now.
{player1}, give out 2 sips to whoever would make the worst maid of honor.
{vip}, give out 4 sips wherever you want. It's your party.
{player1}, give out 2 sips to whoever has the most bridesmaids dresses in their closet.
{vip}, give 3 sips to the person here you've argued with the most. Make up and drink.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever brought the funniest prop tonight.
Everyone who has cried over a breakup in the last year -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has ever been cheated on -- take 2 sips. We love you.
Everyone who is single right now -- take 3 sips. Your time will come.
Everyone who has kissed someone in this room -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has been on a dating app in the last 6 months -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has been to a bachelorette party before -- take 1 sip per bachelorette.
Everyone who has ever ghosted someone -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has seen {vip} naked -- take 2 sips. No context needed.
Everyone who has a partner right now -- take 2 sips. Single girls give out 2 each.
Everyone who has ever had a friend with benefits -- take 3 sips.
Everyone who has ever lied about their body count -- take 3 sips.
Everyone who has stalked an ex on social media this month -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has been friends with {vip} for over 5 years -- give out 2 sips.
Everyone who has sent a risky text -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has been to a strip club -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has cried during a proposal video -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who owns more than 3 bikinis -- give out 1 sip per extra bikini.
Everyone who has matched with someone they know on a dating app -- take 3 sips.
Everyone who has slept with someone on the first date -- take 3 sips. No judgment.
Everyone who has made {vip} cry (happy or sad tears) -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has an embarrassing photo of {vip} on their phone -- take 2 sips. Don't show it.
Everyone who has ever been a bridesmaid -- take 1 sip per time. 4+ times? Take a shot.
Everyone who didn't RSVP on time -- take 3 sips. You stressed {vip} out.
Everyone take 2 sips for the bride. No exceptions. This is law.
Everyone who has traveled with {vip} -- give out 2 sips.
Everyone wearing something borrowed tonight -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has ever lied about their age on an app -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has planned any part of tonight -- give out 3 sips. Heroes.
Everyone who has screenshots of {vip}'s texts -- take 3 sips. Sus.
Everyone who has ever had an awkward run-in with an ex -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who is wearing heels right now -- take 2 sips. Everyone in flats -- give out 2.
Everyone who has ever been set up on a blind date -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has seen {vip}'s wedding dress -- take 2 sips. Don't spoil it!
Everyone who has a group chat with {vip} -- give out 1 sip.
Everyone who thinks they'll cry at {vip}'s wedding -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who has been {vip}'s shoulder to cry on -- give out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who is most likely to get married next. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who will get the drunkest tonight. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who has the most embarrassing dating story. They take 4 sips and must tell it.
On 3, point to who {vip} would call at 3 AM. They give out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who is the biggest flirt. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who is most likely to make {vip} cry tonight (happy tears). They take 3 sips.
On 3, point to who knows {vip} the best. They give out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who would make the best maid of honor. They give out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who has the most exes. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips. No lying.
On 3, point to who is most likely to start crying right now. Most pointed-at takes 2 sips.
On 3, point to who is most likely to accidentally call their ex tonight. Most pointed-at takes 4 sips.
On 3, point to who has been friends with {vip} the longest. They give out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who would survive longest on a reality dating show. They give out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who gives the worst dating advice. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to {vip}'s ride or die. They give out 4 sips.
On 3, point to who is the most likely to ugly cry at the wedding. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who has the spiciest text thread on their phone. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who {vip} has the most inside jokes with. They give out 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has known {vip} longer? Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can name more of {vip}'s exes? Winner gives out 3 sips. {vip} confirms.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can do a better impression of {vip}? {vip} judges. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name love songs back and forth. First to fail drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who would {vip} trust with their phone for an hour? {vip} decides. The other takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who gives better relationship advice? {vip} judges. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name cocktails back and forth. First to fail drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has the juicier ex story? Group votes. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can twerk better? Group votes. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can do a better catwalk? {vip} judges. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name reality dating shows. First to fail takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has a funnier drunk story? Group votes. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name rom-coms back and forth. First to fail drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who is more likely to start a conga line tonight? Group votes. Most likely gives out 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Compliment battle -- say nice things about {vip} back and forth. First to hesitate drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can name more wedding traditions? First to fail drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name Beyonce songs. First to fail drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has the better pickup line? {vip} judges. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name types of wine. Go back and forth. First to fail drinks 3 sips.
{vip} is the Queen. For the next {rule_turns} rounds, everyone must address {vip} as 'Queen.' Forget = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: {vip} is no longer the Queen. Back to being a regular bride-to-be.

prompts.text: For the next {rule_turns} rounds, no one can say {vip}'s partner's name. Say it = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: You can say the partner's name again. The ban is lifted.

prompts.text: {vip} makes a rule right now. It lasts {rule_turns} rounds. Break it = 2 sips.
For the next {rule_turns} rounds, everyone must say 'cheers to the bride!' before drinking. Forget = 2 extra sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: No more mandatory cheers. Drink freely.

prompts.text: Thumbmaster! {vip} is the Thumbmaster for {rule_turns} rounds. When {vip} puts their thumb on the table, last to notice drinks 2 sips.
For the next {rule_turns} rounds, you must compliment {vip} before taking a sip. Skip it = 2 extra sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Compliment rule is over. {vip} is sufficiently gassed up.

prompts.text: For the next {rule_turns} rounds, last person to put their hand up when {vip} says 'bride tribe!' takes 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Bride tribe rule is over. Hands down.

prompts.text: {vip} picks a drinking buddy. For {rule_turns} rounds, whenever {vip} drinks, the buddy drinks too.
prompts.rule_end_text: {vip}'s drinking buddy is free. You survived.

prompts.text: For the next {rule_turns} rounds, before anyone takes a sip, {vip} must approve it. {vip} can deny anyone's sip and make them take double.
prompts.rule_end_text: {vip} no longer controls the sips. Democracy is restored.

prompts.text: {player1}, take {sip_count} sips. The bride demands a sacrifice.
{player1}, take a shot for the bride. Can't? Take 4 sips instead.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. No questions asked. It's a bachelorette.
{player1}, take 5 sips. The wedding fund needs your contribution.
{player1}, take a shot. Can't? Take 5 sips. The maid of honor insists.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. The bridal party has spoken.
{vip}, take a shot. Can't? Take 4 sips. It's YOUR night!
{player1}, take a shot or 4 sips. For the bride!
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. The ring is shiny and so should your buzz be.
{player1}, take a shot. Can't? Take 5 sips. The night is just getting started.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. Consider it a bridesmaid tax.
{player1}, take a shot or 4 sips. Last fling before the ring energy.
Heaven! Last person to raise their glass drinks 3 sips. To the bride!
Waterfall! Everyone starts drinking. You can only stop when the person to your right stops. {vip} starts.
Group photo! Strike a pose. Worst pose (group votes) takes 3 sips.
Dance-off! Two people at a time, group votes. Ultimate loser takes 4 sips.
Everyone scream '{vip}' as loud as you can. Weakest scream takes 3 sips.
{vip}, pick someone. They have to give a 30-second speech about why you're amazing. Fail = 4 sips.
Ring hunt! {vip} hides their ring. First to find it gives out 5 sips. Last person looking takes 3.
Bride says! {vip} gives a command. Last to follow takes 3 sips. Like Simon Says but bridal.
Champagne toast! Everyone take 3 sips together. For the bride-to-be!
Musical statues! Play a song. When {vip} pauses it, last to freeze takes 4 sips.
Everyone guess: what does {vip}'s partner do for work? {vip} judges. Everyone wrong takes 2 sips.
Everyone guess: where is {vip}'s partner originally from? {vip} judges. Wrong answers take 2 sips.
Everyone guess: what is {vip}'s partner's go-to drink order? {vip} judges. Wrong? Take 3 sips.
Everyone guess: what is {vip}'s partner's most annoying habit? {vip} reveals the real answer. Wrong guesses take 2 sips.
Everyone guess: what was {vip}'s partner's first impression of {vip}? {vip} reveals. Wrong takes 3 sips.
Everyone guess: what is {vip}'s partner most afraid of? {vip} judges. Wrong? Take 2 sips.
Everyone guess: what is {vip}'s partner's guilty pleasure TV show? {vip} reveals. Wrong takes 2 sips.
Everyone guess: what would {vip}'s partner say is {vip}'s most annoying habit? {vip} reveals. Wrong takes 3 sips.
{player1}, go up to a stranger and tell them {vip} is getting married. Get them to say "congratulations" to {vip} or take 4 sips.
{player1}, convince a stranger that {vip} is a celebrity. Get them to take a photo with {vip} or take 5 sips.
{player1}, get a stranger to buy {vip} a drink. Fail? The whole group takes 2 sips.
{player1}, go up to a stranger and ask them for their best marriage advice for {vip}. Report back. Take 2 sips for bravery.
{player1}, get a stranger to sign {vip}'s veil, sash, or napkin. Fail? Take 4 sips.
{player1}, take a photo with a stranger and post it to your story captioned "bachelorette vibes." Refuse? Take 4 sips.
Everyone: {vip} picks a song. First person to get a stranger to dance to it with them gives out 3 sips. No takers? Everyone drinks 2.
{player1}, serenade {vip} with a love song in front of everyone. At least 15 seconds. Refuse? Take 5 sips.
Maid of honor, give a 30-second preview of your speech right now. Not ready? Take 5 sips.
Maid of honor, what was the hardest part of planning this bachelorette? Be honest. Take 2 sips for your service.
Maid of honor, when did you first know {vip} was in love? Tell the story. Take 2 sips.
{vip}, say 3 things you love about your maid of honor right now. She takes 1 sip per compliment.
Maid of honor, what is one thing about {vip} that her partner definitely does not know yet? Spill or take 5 sips.
Everyone who has known {vip} since childhood — take 2 sips and share one thing about young {vip} nobody else here knows.
Everyone who met {vip} in college — take 2 sips. What was {vip} like back then? One word each.
Everyone who met {vip} through work — take 2 sips. Did you ever think she'd end up here? Be honest.
Whoever has been friends with {vip} the longest — stand up. Tell us the first memory you have of her. Take 2 sips for the honor.
Whoever is the newest friend in this group — how did you meet {vip}? Tell us the story. Take 2 sips.
Bridesmaids — go around and each say your favorite memory with {vip}. Keep it to 20 seconds each. Take 1 sip after.
{vip}, what was the biggest fight you and your partner had during wedding planning? Spill or take 5 sips.
{vip}, what was the most stressful part of wedding planning? Vent for 30 seconds. Take 2 sips of therapy.
{vip}, did you have any vendor disasters or things go wrong during planning? Tell us the worst one or take 4 sips.
Everyone who had an opinion about the bridesmaids' dresses — take 2 sips. {vip}, were any of them right?
{vip}, what is one thing about the wedding that your partner has NO idea you changed behind their back? Confess or take 5 sips.
On 3, hold up fingers for how many kids you think {vip} and her partner will have. {vip} reveals. Wrong? Take 2 sips.
On 3, everyone guess: who will cry first at the altar — {vip} or her partner? {vip} decides. Wrong side takes 3 sips.
Everyone guess what the first dance song will be. {vip} reveals. Closest wins and gives out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who will catch the bouquet. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips of destiny.
Everyone guess where {vip} and her partner are going on their honeymoon. {vip} reveals. Wrong? Take 2 sips.
{vip}, what is one thing on your "single girl bucket list" that you haven't done yet? The group decides if you do it tonight. Refuse? Take 5 sips.
Everyone say one thing you'll miss about single {vip}. Go around. {vip} takes 1 sip per answer.
{vip}, what is the wildest thing you ever did when you were single? Tell the story or take 5 sips. Last chance to confess.
{vip}, if you could relive one single-girl night, which one and why? Take 3 sips of nostalgia.
Everyone share your favorite memory of a night out with {vip}. Best story (group votes) gives out 3 sips.
Mini-toast round! Go around the table. Everyone raises their glass and gives {vip} one sentence of marriage advice. Take 1 sip after your toast.
{player1}, stand up and give {vip} the worst marriage advice you can think of. Group votes if it's actually good. Take 3 sips.
Everyone say one thing they admire about {vip} as a partner. Go around. {vip} takes 1 sip per compliment. No crying.
{player1}, finish this sentence about {vip}: "I knew she found the one when..." Take 2 sips.
Everyone raise your glass. On 3, everyone shouts one word that describes {vip} as a bride. {vip} drinks for every word she loves.
